question_text: Which of the following is an example of gravitational potential energy store?

options.label: A
options.text: A ball rolling down a hill

options.label: B
options.text: A book sitting on a high shelf

explanation: A book on a high shelf has gravitational potential energy because it is at height above the ground. If it falls, this energy converts to kinetic energy. The other options show elastic, kinetic, or thermal energy stores instead.
